title: Standing Desk (Update)
content: As mentioned in the [previous post](/vent/2013/07/24/standing-desk/), the IKEA standing desk is slightly too low for me. First I thought I would go out and buy a couple of 2x4 lumbers and lay them under the top. However, I looked around and found a couple new reams of "Shin-Tzu" paper. The height of the package looks about right. The top is now at 101cm. This is still too low but it is definitely better than before. For my height, the proper desk top should be around 110cm. My elbow will be positioned at approximately 90 degree angle. But I'm afraid another stack of these paper will cause my desk to be too unstable. I will settle with this for now. ​
